is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of uncomplicated Plasmodium falciparum malaria in Burkina Faso.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Genotyping used msp-2, msp-1, and 4 microsatellites only to distinguish recrudescence from new infection; no drug-resistance codon markers (Pfcrt, Pfdhfr, Pfdhps, Pfk13, Pfmdr1, etc.) were genotyped or reported.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: No molecular marker allele frequencies are reported; only clinical efficacy outcomes and treatment failure risks.

sub_country_location.evidence: Samples from 3 government health dispensaries (Colsama, Sarfalao, Ouezzinville) in Bobo-Dioulasso, western Burkina Faso.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: No explicit collection dates given; study conducted around 2005-2007 but no drug-resistance data to bin temporally.

african_field_samples.evidence: Human clinical isolates collected in Bobo-Dioulasso, Burkina Faso.

is_primary_study.evidence: Randomized clinical trial (ISRCTN94367569), a primary empirical study.

duplicate_risk.evidence: New field collection from a clinical trial in Bobo-Dioulasso; no indication of overlap with a larger molecular surveillance dataset.

supplement.evidence: No supplementary molecular marker data referenced; the study did not genotype drug-resistance markers.

assessment.summary: Randomized clinical trial comparing three antimalarial combination regimens (AQSP, artemether-lumefantrine, dihydroartemisinin-piperaquine) for uncomplicated P. falciparum malaria in Bobo-Dioulasso, Burkina Faso. Genotyping used only msp-2, msp-1, and microsatellites to distinguish recrudescence from new infection; no drug-resistance codon markers were assessed or reported. The study is therefore ineligible.
exclusion_reasons: No curated drug-resistance codon markers (Pfcrt, Pfcytb, Pfdhfr, Pfdhps, Pfk13, Pfmdr1) were genotyped or reported
No extractable per-locus marker frequencies available
